title: patch(sdk): Updated the docs fixed DOM construction and parsing
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Safety first in the SDK
gist.blurb: We did a little spring cleaning in the SDK! Quick-start examples are now safer to copy-paste, and our retry logic is smarter about weird headers.
gist.summary: Updated the SDK documentation to use safe DOM construction methods and improved the strictness of Retry-After header parsing.
gist.impact: Developers copying the quick-start examples will get safer code by default, and the SDK client now handles malformed retry headers more gracefully.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee wearing a tiny hard hat and safety goggles, sweeping up some code blocks with a broom. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head is holding a shield with a checkmark on it, representing safety and robustness.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat and safety goggles, sweeping up glowing code blocks with a small broom. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a shield with a green checkmark. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
